title: Salty Juicy British Fish Stew
description: A comforting one-pot British fish stew infused with Mediterranean flair, featuring a bright yellow bell pepper, aromatic herbs, and a savory brine.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion, sliced yellow pepper, and minced garlic; sauté until the vegetables soften, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the smoked paprika and dried oregano, cooking for an additional 30 seconds to release their aromas.
Pour in the crushed tomatoes and fish stock, and bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Add the cod cubes and mussels, cover, and cook for 8–10 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily and the mussels open.
Squeeze in the fresh lemon juice, then season the stew with a pinch of salt and a sprinkle of pepper to taste.
Turn off the heat and let the stew rest for 2 minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot, accompanied by crusty bread if desired.
